title: Metene Back Scrubber for Shower, Shower Brush for Exfoliating Skin and A Soft Scrub, Double-sided Body Brush Head for Wet or Dry Brushing, Long Wooden Handle Cleans the Body Easily
features: Soft and Stiff Brush 2 Pack: The stiff natural bristle body dry brush can massage the leg and foot skin, deeply clean the cutin and dirt on the skin surface, the soft natural bristle body dry brush can protect the sensitive skin such as neck and face, and provide a gentle and smooth the way for the skin.

Benefits for Whole Body Skin: If you often dry brush, skin brush can not only make skin smooth but also you can get the following benefits: exfoliation, smooth pores, smoother and softer skin, reduce fat mass, stimulate the lymphatic system.

High Quality Dry Brush: The natural bristle body brush is made of durable bristles. After careful selection, it has high purity and is gentle and friendly to human skin. The dry body brush is made of natural bamboo by hand, with an anti skid flax belt, comfortable to hold, and easy to operate.
Easy to Carry: This body dry brush is light in weight and easy to carry and pack. Besides, there are two hooks on the package for easy hanging.
You Will Get: 1 * Stiff dry brush, 1 * soft dry brush, 2 * hook, and worry-free after-sales service. We offer a 12-month satisfaction guarantee. Every penny you spend on our product is risk free.
description: Product Description Metene Shower Brush with Soft and Stiff Bristles,for Exfoliating Skin and A Soft Scrub,Double-sided Brush Head for Wet or Dry Brushing,Specially Long Wooden Handle Cleans the Body Easily Steps: Step 1: Wet the whole body with a shower Step 2: Apply appropriate bath solution to the bath brush Step 3: Rub the brush with your hands to create a rich foam Step 4: Wash the whole body with the body brush Step 5: Shower clean all foam on the body Step 6: Rinse the bath brush with water and dry it Benefits of Brushing: Cleaning effect: The bath brush long handle for shower can clean pore and exfoliate, remove dirt and dead skin in pore, excess oil and residue to make skin healthier. Reduce cellulite: Body brush can massage the skin, soften the stearic fat deposits under the skin, help reduce the appearance of fat mass, make the skin softer and smoother. Promoting circulation: Long-term use of dry shower brush can stimulate the body's lymphatic system, promote blood circulation, and help the body detoxify. Natural Stiff Bristle The hard bristle of the body brush can remove cutin, blocked pore, dirt and dead skin, promote blood circulation, and promote smooth and glowing skin. Soft Nylon Bristle The soft nylon hair of bath brush, combined with bath fluid, can gently clean and soften the skin. It is very suitable for sensitive and delicate skin and makes the skin healthier. Super-long Handle of Lotus The shower brush is made of durable lotus wood with a handle over 17 inches. It can easily clean the back and legs that the hands can't touch. Anti-slip Buttons and Suspensible Design The bath brush has four rubber anti-skid buttons. It won't slip easily when taking a bath. The suspension design makes the bath brush easier to air-dry.
